prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 211工程、双一流建设高校；软科主榜排名近年约54–67名（2026年67名），属中上水平211，排名稳定；安全科学与工程A+（全国顶尖）、测绘科学与技术A-、土木工程A-，共3个A-及以上学科，与该校矿业、安全、测绘等特色招生专业高度关联，对相关专业报考有一定 吸引力；近年声誉评价中性/混合，无明显负面舆情；抖音综合热度排名第68位（评价"一般"），短视频曝光量中等，未出现报考关注度异常升温信号；未见投档断档记录。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 电气工程及其自动化、电子信息/通信等专业2024–2025年社会热度高热推荐，计算机类持续偏热，这些专业均为该校在广西的主要招生方向，可 能吸引更多高分考生关注；本省2026年物理类考生估算约26.9万人，较2025年增加约3.3%，竞争加剧；该校位于江苏徐州，非本省高校，在广西理科招生占比约2.2%–2.4%（2025年67人/全国约3000人），属中等偏低比例，无显著地域偏好影响。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基准位次13697名、2026年小幅扩招4人（位次数字增大）、本省物理类考生增加约3.3%（竞争加剧）、电气/电子信息等热门专业持续高热（吸引高分考生）等 因素，再结合考生规模增长做小幅上调，预测2026年最低位次约14218名，区间13718–14718名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for science (physics category) was approximately 11696 → 14487 → 14698 → 31790 (anomaly due to new Gaokao major group split in 2024) → 13697. In the past 3 years (excluding the 2024 anomaly), it fluctuated roughly between 13697 and 14698, with the 2025 baseline around 13697. The provincial science (physics category) enrollment plan was 68 in 2021, 68 in 2022, 64 in 2023, 65 in 2024, and 67 in 2025. The 2026 plan is 71, an increase of 4 from 2025, a small expansion of about 6%, slightly intensifying competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 211 Project and Double First-Class university; its Soft Science main ranking has been around 54–67 in recent years (67th in 2026), placing it in the upper-middle tier of 211 universities with stable rankings. It has A+ in Safety Science and Engineering (top nationally), A- in Surveying and Mapping Science and Technology, and A- in Civil Engineering, totaling 3 A- or above disciplines, which are highly correlated with its featured majors in mining, safety, and surveying, attracting some interest for related programs. Recent reputation evaluations are neutral/mixed, with no significant negative public opinion. Its Douyin comprehensive popularity ranking is 68th (rated "average"), with moderate short video exposure and no signs of abnormal surge in application attention. No records of enrollment gaps were found.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Majors such as Electrical Engineering and Automation, Electronic Information/Communication have been highly recommended in 2024–2025, and Computer Science remains consistently popular. These are the main enrollment directions for this university in Guangxi, potentially attracting more high-scoring candidates. The estimated number of physics category candidates in Guangxi for 2026 is about 269,000, an increase of about 3.3% from 2025, intensifying competition. The university is located in Xuzhou, Jiangsu, not a local institution, and its science enrollment proportion in Guangxi is about 2.2%–2.4% (67 out of approximately 3,000 nationally in 2025), a moderately low proportion with no significant regional preference effect.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 13697, a small expansion of 4 places in 2026 (ranking number increases), an increase of about 3.3% in local physics category candidates (intensified competition), and the sustained high popularity of hot majors like Electrical and Electronic Information (attracting high-scoring candidates), along with a slight upward adjustment based on candidate scale growth, the predicted minimum ranking for 2026 is approximately 14218, with a range of 13718–14718.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:

- Electrical Engineering and Automation
- Computer Science (Computer Science and Technology, Information Security, Data Science and Big Data Technology)
- Electronic Information Engineering/Automation
- Robotics Engineering.
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Moderate)
- Mechanical Engineering (Intelligent Manufacturing Engineering, Mechanical Engineering)
- Energy and Power Engineering (Energy Storage Science and Engineering, Energy and Power Engineering)
- Remote Sensing Science and Technology
- Safety Science and Engineering (Safety Engineering, Fire Engineering, etc.)
- Surveying and Mapping (Surveying Engineering, Geographic Information Science).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy to Enter)
- Chemical and Pharmaceutical Engineering
- Civil Engineering (Civil Engineering, Engineering Management)
- Geology (Geological Engineering, Resource Exploration Engineering)
- Mining Engineering (Intelligent Mining Engineering, New Energy Science and Engineering, etc.)
- Materials Science and Engineering
- Environmental Engineering.
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking falls within the predicted range of 13718–14718, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors (Safety Science and Engineering A+, Surveying and Mapping A-, Energy and Power Engineering, etc.) as the main choices, with Tier 1 majors (Electrical, Computer, Electronic Information) as reach options, and Tier 3 majors (Civil, Mining, Geology, etc.) as safety choices. If your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (<13718), you can prioritize reaching for Tier 1 flagship majors.
